footer.description: Trauma and Orthopedics Specialists. Precision medical equipment.

hero.title: Specialists in Trauma and Orthopedics
hero.subtitle: Precision medical equipment for hospitals and surgeons. Over 15 years providing certified quality solutions to health institutions in Mexico.

cta.title: Need specialized equipment?
cta.subtitle: Contact us today for technical advice and personalized quotes.

whyUs.title: Quality and Trust in every Procedure
whyUs.description: Orthomaster is a leading Mexican company in the distribution of specialized medical equipment in trauma, orthopedics, and rehabilitation. With over 15 years of experience, we provide hospitals, clinics, and health professionals with the highest quality products, backed by international certifications and specialized technical support.

about.title: Our Journey
about.subtitle: Driving precision medicine
about.missionText: We contribute to and support hospitals and health professionals by distributing products and services of the highest quality, reliability, and safety, achieving market leadership while promoting opportunities for development and satisfaction among our collaborators by being a company of integrity.
about.visionText: To satisfy the needs of doctors and hospitals so they can provide high-quality services, positively impacting the health and well-being of their patients, offering innovative products with the highest standards of quality, functionality, and safety, while providing professional care with highly trained and qualified personnel.
about.valuesSubtitle: Every decision at Orthomaster is backed by solid principles that guarantee the best experience for our clients.

valuesList.title: Quality
valuesList.description: Certified products that meet the highest international standards.

valuesList.title: Precision
valuesList.description: High-tech equipment for exact surgical procedures.

valuesList.title: Trust
valuesList.description: Specialized technical support and guaranteed after-sales service.

valuesList.title: Innovation
valuesList.description: Always at the forefront with the latest advances in medical technology.

about.certificationsSubtitle: Our products and processes comply with the strictest international quality standards.
about.moreInfo: Want to know more or see our catalog?
about.moreInfoSubtitle: Our team is available to advise you and offer the best solution for your institution.

offices.description: We have a strategic infrastructure to provide high-tech medical solutions in key points of the Mexican territory.
offices.coverage: We can reach 73% of the population through our offices and distribution channels.
offices.trustDescription: Our strategic location guarantees optimal delivery times and immediate technical support for the medical community.
